description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure, likely male, with a short, textured hairstyle reminiscent of ancient Egyptian art. The figure is bare-chested and wears a simple, knee-length skirt, sitting upright on a blocky, rectangular seat. The surface shows a combination of white and reddish-brown hues, with some areas appearing worn or weathered, especially on the legs and feet. The facial features are stylized, with a calm, neutral expression and closed lips. The back of the sculpture is plain, with the seat forming a solid support. The overall form is compact and solid, suggesting it is carved from a single block of stone or similar material.
description: A compact, seated human figure sculpture with a stylized face, short textured hair, and a simple skirt, rendered in white and reddish-brown tones. The figure sits upright on a rectangular block seat, with visible wear on the surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, chest, and knees, with hands resting on the thighs and feet together on the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, arm, and the blocky seat, showing the figure's posture and the seat's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the solid rectangular seat, with minimal detail on the figure's back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and seat, with visible wear on the lower legs and feet.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is plain and does not indicate an environment.
